runs.mode: feat (3 vagues — store-ready + DX enablers + museum-web W2)
runs.notes: Wave 1: iOS perms, i18n errors 8 locales, 429 retry, share branding. Wave 2: Zod validation 10 auth routes +10 tests, coverage CI thresholds, migration transactions. Wave 3: museum-web W2 landing + admin API. BE 941->951. Total 1078->1088.
Read-only process audit. 7 amendements (AM-002-008), 4 PE (PE-008-011), process maturity 3.8/5. KB gaps R7-R9 identifies, Feature Existence Check propose.
8 new theme tokens, 92% hardcoded color reduction, dark mode bug fixed. Agent scope creep: FlashList + React Compiler + component tests committed without mandate. Tests 47→71 (+24 from scope creep).

runs.mode: feature (museum-web liquid glass redesign + backend review module)
runs.notes: Full-stack: museum-web liquid glass landing page (real screenshots, logo, glass cards, mesh gradients) + backend review module (hexagonal, 5 use cases, 16 tests). Backend Architect had EP-014 scope creep recidive (reverted). Sentinelle PASS @ 88/100. Tests 979->1054 (+75). Coverage 52.13%->52.45%.

Read-only audit. 6 scans (backend, frontend, security, tests, devops, langchain) + Sentinelle cross-validation. 7 corrections (1 refuted, 4 downgraded, 1 upgraded, 2 stale-data). Scan accuracy 78%. 2 CRITICAL, 5 HIGH, 14 MEDIUM, 12 LOW. 81/100 CONDITIONAL GO. 3 GO conditions (path-to-regexp, langsmith, reset token hashing).

35 commits hors cycle /team. 7 features (image enrichment, museum geo, PgBouncer, K6, reset password, daily art, chat tests). 20 fixes (prod readiness audit, SSL, CI/CD, iOS crash). 6 refactors (9 repos SQL->TypeORM, CI consolidation 10->3, ChatModule encapsulation). 55 new tests. All 5 R16 GO conditions resolved (path-to-regexp, langsmith, reset tokens, CircuitBreaker, route tests). Ratchet: 1433 tests, 0 tsc, 4 as-any, coverage 72.86%. KB catchup executed 2026-03-31.
